title: tirucalia juttae
intro: Tirucalia juttae is a plant species commonly known as the "Gamboge tree," native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and anti-cancer properties, due to the presence of gamboge resin, a natural latex. The health benefits of Tirucalia juttae include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and potentially preventing cancer cell growth. Herbal preparations of Tirucalia juttae include powder, extract, and capsules, often used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine practices.
